_comment_label: Root node label — appears in the page header and at the center of the canvas.
label: My Vault
_comment_roots: Each root becomes a top-level branch of the canvas. 'name' is the display label, 'path' is a directory on disk. Supports ~ for your home directory. Add as many as you like.
_comment_branchColors: Optional. Tints the connector lines radiating from each branch. Hex colors. Keys must match the 'name' fields above. Missing keys fall back to a neutral warm tone.
_comment_statusColors: Optional. Colors used for the 'ambient status' border/tint on project nodes whose metadata declares a phase. Any keys you omit fall back to the built-in palette.
_comment_statusYaml: Optional. Path to a YAML file listing projects with phase/momentum metadata (format: a flat list of dicts with 'path' and 'phase' keys). Set to null to skip.
_comment_exclude: Directory names (not paths) to skip anywhere in the tree. Dotfiles are already skipped.
